focus: Fix generate-context.js pipeline so JSON-mode saves produce high-quality memories. Root cause: extractConversations() ignores structured JSON data, quality scorer requires conversation messages, template produces boilerplate when extractors return empty data, V8 contamination blocks cross-phase references.
researchQuestions: How should extractConversations() build MESSAGES from sessionSummary/keyDecisions/observations when userPrompts is empty?
What quality scoring dimensions should apply to JSON-mode inputs vs transcript inputs?
How can V8 contamination filter distinguish same-parent phase refs from genuine cross-spec contamination?
What is the optimal trigger phrase extraction strategy for structured JSON input?
How should the template renderer handle JSON-sourced observations vs transcript-sourced ones?
What key_files scoping strategy prevents 300+ entry lists while preserving useful file references?
How can decision rendering avoid 4x text repetition when only keyDecision text is available?
What is the minimum viable JSON payload that should produce a >= 50/100 quality memory?
